basic_details.organization_name: Maa Saraswati Institute of Engineering & Technology (MSIET)
basic_details.short_information: Maa Saraswati Institute of Engineering & Technology (MSIET) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 73 Director Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 21 days from the date of publication of this advertisement, Published on Wednesday, June 10, 2026

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSIET Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.msiet.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MSIET Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MSIET Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.msiet.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSIET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the MSIET Recruitment 2026 is 01-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MSIET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 73 vacancies are available for various posts, including Director, Professor, Assistant Professor, and non-teaching positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for MSIET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for MSIET Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post or by hand.

faq.question: Q4. Where can I download the application form for MSIET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of MSIET, which is www.msiet.com.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for all posts is graduate, with specific qualifications and experience requirements as per AICTE/State Govt/MDU, Rohtak norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the location of Maa Saraswati Institute of Engineering & Technology?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Rohtak, Haryana.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MSIET Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is regular, indicating permanent employment.

faq.question: Q9. Who should I contact if I have queries regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any queries, it is advisable to refer to the official notification or contact the institute directly through the provided contact details on their website.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all testimonials, experience certificates, photograph, and signature with the application form.
